_comment: Canonical MCP server list. Single source of truth fanned out to Claude Code (~/.claude.json), OMP (~/.omp/agent/mcp.json), and Codex (~/.codex/config.toml) by ai/mcp/apply-mcp.sh. Secrets in `auth` resolve via 1Password (auth.op) on nix machines and via the env var (auth.env) in containers. Project-specific servers belong in each project's .mcp.json, not here.
